scripts.build:github-pages: if [ -z "$BASE_URL" ]; then echo 'BASE_URL is required' >&2; exit 1; fi; sh ./scripts/build_hugo.sh --gc --minify --environment production --baseURL "$BASE_URL" && sh ./scripts/run_pagefind.sh public
scripts.build:cloudflare-pages: if [ -z "$CF_PAGES_URL" ]; then echo 'CF_PAGES_URL is required' >&2; exit 1; fi; sh ./scripts/build_hugo.sh --gc --minify --environment production --baseURL "${CF_PAGES_URL}/" && sh ./scripts/run_pagefind.sh public
